examples.title: Keras Transfer Learning
examples.description: Transfer learning implementation with frozen layers
examples.code:
base_model = VGG16(weights='imagenet', include_top=False)
for layer in base_model.layers[:15]:
    layer.trainable = False
x = Flatten()(base_model.output)
output = Dense(10, activation='softmax')(x)
examples.explanation: Freezes first 15 layers of VGG16 for feature extraction
